metadata.title: Crystal Structure of GDP-bound Human KRas
Crystal Structure of human KRAS G12C covalently bound to AMG 510

additional_datasets.label: BCR-ABL1 Oncology
additional_datasets.challenge_objective: Identify the distal myristoyl pocket used by Asciminib.
additional_datasets.risk_note: The validation structure also contains an ATP-site inhibitor, so allosteric-vs-orthosteric ligand labels must be kept separate.

metadata.title: Structural basis for the auto-inhibition of c-Abl tyrosine kinase
ABL1 kinase (T334I_D382N) in complex with asciminib and nilotinib

additional_datasets.label: Cardiac Myosin Cardiology
additional_datasets.challenge_objective: Identify the mechanical site where Mavacamten stabilizes the super-relaxed state.
additional_datasets.target_ligand_label: No Mavacamten-like validation ligand detected in 6C1H by PDB component ID/name.
additional_datasets.risk_note: RCSB describes 6C1H as actin-bound myosin-IB cryo-EM, not a cardiac myosin Mavacamten holo complex; treat it as a structural validation proxy only after challenge-organizer confirmation.
